  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/projects"}
  context={"endpoint"}

Create a team workspace under the caller's organization.

  as={"h2"}

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"displayName":{"type":"string","pattern":"^[^./]+$"},"externalId":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string"},{"type":"null"}]},"metadata":{"anyOf":[{"type":"object","propertyNames":{"type":"string"},"additionalProperties":{}},{"type":"null"}]},"maxConcurrentJobs":{"anyOf":[{"type":"number"},{"type":"null"}]},"globalConnectionExternalIds":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"alertReceiverEmail":{"anyOf":[{"type":"string","format":"email","pattern":"^(?!\\.)(?!.*\\.\\.)([A-Za-z0-9_'+\\-\\.]*)[A-Za-z0-9_+-]@([A-Za-z0-9][A-Za-z0-9\\-]*\\.)+[A-Za-z]{2,}$"},{"type":"null"}]}},"required":["displayName"]}}},"required":true}}
>
